title: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication
summary: Argues that system reliability correlates directly with simplicity. Uses Netflix circuit breaker as evidence. Relevant when making architecture decisions that trade complexity for features.
author: Jane Doe

logic_chain: Complex systems fail in complex ways
Simplicity is a feature, not a compromise

brilliant_quotes.text: The best code is no code at all.

narrative_craft: Uses concrete war stories to build credibility
concrete_examples: Netflix's circuit breaker pattern reduced cascading failures by 70%
counterpoints: Author acknowledges simplicity can be premature in exploratory phases

key_claims: Simplicity in system design directly correlates with reliability
Most system failures come from unnecessary complexity

reuse_contexts.how: Use as argument for simpler approach
